honesty: Synthetic muckpiles + the generator per-pixel truth as the authority. frag-edge is trained on TRUE inter-fragment seams; its boundary-F1 is held-out, and its DOWNSTREAM P50 effect vs the classical watershed is measured by eval_frag.mjs (the watershed is TypeScript). The fines regressor corrects the recovered P50 toward truth. Reported whichever way the numbers land.
